title: Nigel Farage, Leader of Reform UK, Says £5 Million Gift Was ‘Reward’ for Brexit
summary_full: Nigel Farage, the leader of the populist right-wing party, had previously said the money was for personal security.
summary_public: Nigel Farage, the leader of the populist right-wing party, had previously said the money was for personal security.
